seo.title: Building Customer Support with AutoGen + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build customer support with AutoGen + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building customer support systems with AutoGen enables multi-agent collaboration for handling inquiries via RAG, CRM integration, and tool-calling. However, conversational agents risk infinite loops, unsafe code execution, hallucinated responses, and policy violations in high-stakes interactions. Vex provides essential guardrails to verify response accuracy, filter PII, ensure tone consistency, and trigger escalations.

architectureOverview.heading: Customer Support Architecture with AutoGen
architectureOverview.description:
The architecture features a Supervisor Agent that routes customer queries to specialized agents: a RAG Agent for knowledge base retrieval, a CRM Agent for order lookup and ticket creation, and a Policy Agent for compliance checks. Agents communicate via AutoGen's group chat manager, with tools for external API calls to CRM systems like Salesforce. Human-in-the-loop escalation occurs when verification fails or complex issues arise.

Retrieval starts with embedding customer queries against a knowledge base, followed by LLM synthesis. CRM tools use function calling for safe data access, while Vex filters replies to prevent PII leakage and ensure professional tone. Multi-turn debates are bounded to avoid token waste.
architectureOverview.diagram:
Customer Query --> Supervisor Agent
                   |
             +-----+-----+
             |           |
        RAG Agent   CRM Agent
             |           |
      KnowledgeBase   CRM API
             |           |
             +-----+-----+
                   |
             Policy Agent --> Vex Guardrails
                   |
              Group Chat Manager --> Response

risks.name: Infinite conversation loops
risks.description: Agents ping-pong between RAG and CRM without converging on ticket resolution
risks.mitigation: Vex detects repetitive patterns and forces termination or escalation

risks.name: PII leakage in responses
risks.description: CRM lookups expose customer phone/email in agent replies
risks.mitigation: Vex PII filtering redacts sensitive data before final output

risks.name: Incorrect ticket creation
risks.description: Agents agree on wrong order details leading to bad CRM updates
risks.mitigation: Vex verifies factual accuracy against CRM data before tool calls

risks.name: Unprofessional tone
risks.description: Multi-turn debates produce sarcastic or off-brand responses
risks.mitigation: Vex enforces brand tone guidelines in every reply

implementation.title: Core AutoGen Group Chat Setup
implementation.description: Initialize agents and group chat with customer support roles
implementation.code:
from autogen import AssistantAgent, GroupChat, GroupChatManager

llm_config = {"config_list": [{"model": "gpt-4", "api_key": os.environ["OPENAI_API_KEY"]}]}

rag_agent = AssistantAgent(name="RAG", llm_config=llm_config, system_message="Retrieve from knowledge base using RAG.")
crm_agent = AssistantAgent(name="CRM", llm_config=llm_config, system_message="Handle order lookup and ticket creation.")
policy_agent = AssistantAgent(name="Policy", llm_config=llm_config, system_message="Check compliance and tone.")

supervisor = AssistantAgent(name="Supervisor", llm_config=llm_config, is_leader=True)
groupchat = GroupChat(agents=[supervisor, rag_agent, crm_agent, policy_agent], messages=[])
manager = GroupChatManager(groupchat=groupchat, llm_config=llm_config)

implementation.title: RAG Knowledge Base Retrieval
implementation.description: Implement vector search for customer support docs
implementation.code:
import chromadb
from langchain.embeddings import OpenAIEmbeddings

client = chromadb.Client()
collection = client.get_or_create_collection("support_kb")
embeddings = OpenAIEmbeddings()

def retrieve_docs(query):
    query_embedding = embeddings.embed_query(query)
    results = collection.query(query_embeddings=[query_embedding], n_results=3)
    return results['documents'][0]

rag_agent.register_for_llm(name="rag_tool")(retrieve_docs)

implementation.title: CRM Tool Calling for Orders
implementation.description: Safe function calling for CRM integration

implementation.title: Initiate Customer Support Chat
implementation.description: Start group chat with customer query
implementation.code:
customer_query = "My order #12345 hasn't shipped, can you check?"
manager.initiate_chat(supervisor, message=customer_query)
print(manager.last_message()['content'])
